name: Beeline Holdings, Inc.
business: Beeline Holdings, Inc. is a fintech mortgage lender, fractional real estate equity purchase facilitator and title provider. The company's platform utilizes proprietary AI and technology to originate mortgage loans, provide title services, and offer SaaS products like BlinkQC. Its customers include consumers seeking mortgage loans (especially non-QM loans for self-employed and gig economy workers) and other lenders for title and closing services.
namedSuppliers: First American National Title Insurance Company

exposures.sentence: The Company is a fintech mortgage lender, fractional real estate equity purchase facilitator and title provider transforming the home ownership process into a shorter, easier path than conventional mortgage lending for millions of Americans seeking a digital experience.

catalysts.event: BlinkQC licensing to other mortgage companies begins
catalysts.sentence: Later in 2026, Beeline Labs plans to license BlinkQC to other mortgage companies.

catalysts.event: Direct seller approval with Fannie Mae and/or Freddie Mac
catalysts.sentence: The Company also plans to have direct seller approval with Fannie Mae and/or Freddie Mac in the second half of 2026.
